calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-15-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two minors.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Petitioner: Emily Lu Lee present in pro per for the minors: Michael Sing Lei and Mickey Yan Lei and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name of Michael Sing Lei to Michael Sing Lee and of Mickey Yan Lei to Mickey Yan Lee.
Decrees signed in open court.
